description: Semantic roles for component-scoped color tokens. Assigned via the `colorRole` name-object field alongside `colorFamily` (e.g. colorFamily=blue + colorRole=primary → the primary blue color for a component).

values.label: Primary
values.description: Primary color role — the main foreground color for an element

values.label: Background
values.description: Background color role — fill or surface color behind an element

values.label: Neutral
values.description: Neutral semantic color role, distinct from a specific hue
